intro.title:
CRIPTO-
CAOS
intro.subtitle: la verdad detrás del ascenso de las criptomonedas

layers.definition:
Las criptomonedas prometen riqueza,
pero esconden un lado oscuro.
El fraude es más común de lo que crees.
layers.detail: En 2021, se reportaron $14 mil millones en fraudes de criptomonedas.

phase1.title:
Promesas
Vacías
phase1.narrative: Los estafadores prometen retornos rápidos y garantizados. Usan tácticas psicológicas para atraer a inversores desprevenidos.
phase1.detail: Casi un 40% de los fraudes de criptomonedas son esquemas piramidales.

phase2.title:
El Miedo
Vende
phase2.narrative: Muchos fraudes se aprovechan del miedo de perder la 'próxima gran oportunidad'. Los estafadores manipulan emociones para cerrar el trato.
phase2.detail: El 60% de las víctimas reportan presión emocional para invertir.

phase3.title:
La Verdad
Se Esconde
phase3.narrative: A pesar de las pérdidas, un 70% de las víctimas nunca denuncia el fraude por vergüenza o miedo. Esto perpetúa el ciclo.
phase3.detail: El 70% de las víctimas no reportan los fraudes a las autoridades.

close.title:
El conocimiento
es tu
mayor defensa
close.subtitle: Comparte para que otros no caigan en la trampa

imagePrompts.intro: Hyper-realistic cinematic photograph. Extreme close-up of a shattered cryptocurrency coin on a dark surface, reflecting ominous red light. Shot on RED Monstro 8K, anamorphic 50mm lens. Neon reflections creating dramatic contrast. No text, no logos. Vertical 9:16. Photorealistic.
imagePrompts.layers: Hyper-realistic cinematic photograph. Overhead view of a digital trading floor, screens filled with graphs, one showing a sudden drop. Shot on RED Monstro 8K, anamorphic 50mm lens. Cold blue-white fluorescent light. No text, no logos. Vertical 9:16. Photorealistic.
imagePrompts.phase1: Hyper-realistic cinematic photograph. POV of a person looking at a phone screen showing a fake crypto investment app. Shot on RED Monstro 8K, anamorphic 50mm lens. Single point backlight casting harsh shadows. No text, no logos. Vertical 9:16. Photorealistic.
imagePrompts.phase2: Hyper-realistic cinematic photograph. Wide-angle shot of a crowded seminar room with a charismatic speaker promising wealth, audience captivated. Shot on RED Monstro 8K, anamorphic 50mm lens. Warm ambient lighting with volumetric fog. No text, no logos. Vertical 9:16. Photorealistic.
imagePrompts.phase3: Hyper-realistic cinematic photograph. Macro shot of a closed hand holding a broken chain, symbolizing broken trust. Shot on RED Monstro 8K, anamorphic 50mm lens. Single overhead light creating stark contrast. No text, no logos. Vertical 9:16. Photorealistic.
imagePrompts.reality: Hyper-realistic cinematic photograph. Extreme close-up of a determined face reflecting a computer screen displaying research articles on cryptocurrency safety. Shot on RED Monstro 8K, anamorphic 50mm lens. Soft white light illuminating features. No text, no logos. Vertical 9:16. Photorealistic.
imagePrompts.close: Hyper-realistic cinematic photograph. Overhead shot of a person at a desk filled with notes and financial reports, a sign reading 'Knowledge is Power' prominently visible. Shot on RED Monstro 8K, anamorphic 50mm lens. Warm desk lamp light creating cozy ambiance. No text, no logos. Vertical 9:16. Photorealistic.
